## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest`; GUI tests via `xvfb-run -a pytest` if headless)
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` / docs updated if needed
- [ ] Fit mathematics unchanged, or the change is intentional and documented
      (numerics live in `pylcf/core.py`)
